name: Pothos (TypeScript GraphQL Schema Builder)

auth.notes: Schema builder; auth via context and plugins

performance.notes: GraphQL execution performance; Pothos overhead is minimal

agent_readiness.notes: Code-first TypeScript GraphQL schema builder. builder.queryType, builder.objectType, builder.mutationType. Plugins: relay (Cursor pagination), errors, prisma (automatic Prisma integration), auth-z, dataloader, tracing. Prisma plugin auto-generates types from Prisma schema. Relay cursor pagination out of box. Type safety from TypeScript generics — no code generation needed. Used by major GraphQL TypeScript projects. Alternative to TypeGraphQL with cleaner API.

gotchas: Steeper learning curve than type-graphql decorators
Plugin ecosystem required for full functionality (relay, prisma, auth)
Prisma plugin requires specific Prisma schema patterns
best_when: TypeScript GraphQL APIs wanting code-first without decorators
Prisma + GraphQL with automatic type generation
Relay-compliant GraphQL APIs with cursor pagination
avoid_when: Simple GraphQL APIs (graphql-yoga + schema SDL simpler)
summary: Pothos is a code-first TypeScript GraphQL schema builder. builder.queryType/objectType/mutationType with full TypeScript inference — no codegen. Plugins: relay (cursor pagination), prisma (auto-types from Prisma), auth-z, dataloader. Type safety from generics. Alternative to TypeGraphQL with cleaner non-decorator API. Best for TypeScript + Prisma + GraphQL projects.
